titleStmt.title: SII 33.188: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 188. (A.R. No. B 201 of 1951.) Vaṅganūru, Tadpatri Taluk, Anantapur District.

summary.p: Stone (No. 1) on the tank bund on the border of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1429, Prabhava, Kārttika śu. 12, Monday corresponding to 1507 A.D. October 17, Sunday (not Monday) °71.

Records that Siddapanāyani-Koppinēniṁgāru of the Anukūla-gōtra granted lands and levies in Beḍudūru as Sarvamānya to Koṇḍaya Krishṇayya-Timmayya for defraying the expenses during the festival occasions at Śrīparvata for the benefit of pilgrims. Also states that Beḍadūru was given as nāyaṅkara to Koppīneni by Sāḷuva Timmarāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁ
bulu 1429 Agunēṭi prabha
va saṁvvaccara kā¨rttika śu 12 sō
śrīmatu Anukūlagotra si
ddapanāyini koppinēniṁgāru
gādelapalli māṁcciri koṁḍaya
kriṣṇayya tiṁmmayya gāriki yiccina
dhammaśāsanaṁ kramamu māku sāḷu
tiṁmarājuggāru nāyaṁkranaku Icci
beḍadūranu mīru reḍiceruviṁda
kritaṁ peṭivalesatāru śrīpa¨rvva
taṁ naḍaceḍi vasālanu nīḷlu Aṁ
bali vaṁṭi kaulupeṭi samaṁddamu
mīku beṭṭina mānyaṁ cenu beḍū
ri pōlamēra vāgu tū¨rpū cēnu kha 2
Akṣarālānu yirupuṭi cēnu mānyaṁ mī
ku peṭe dāsavima baya ka
peṁṭa suṁka domari pannu pū
velugu mōdalugānu māni sa
¨rvvamānyaṁgānu māIstimī pū
tra pavutrapāraṁparaṁgānu Ā
caṁdra¨rkastaIgānu mī
vasāyaṁsēsuko
sakaḷayama Anubhaviṁ
cēdi I dha¨rmmaṁ
naku yevvaru va
kraṁ AIccinanu kō
vunu brahmani talinitaṁ
ḍrulanu vāraṇāsilōnu va
dhiIcina dōṣānabōvāru
Ani vesina dha¨rmmasāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 33.188 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
